---
name: Evidence-state change
description: Propose changing a repository or publication claim from one C0–C5 state to another
title: "Evidence: "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Claim

State one precise claim. Avoid combining multiple capabilities or conclusions.

## Current state

Select one: C0 concept, C1 specification, C2 implementation, C3 internal validation, C4 independent reproduction, or C5 domain validation.

## Proposed state

Select the proposed C0–C5 state.

## Evidence package

Link to the exact commit, source path, release, test, workflow run, reproduction report, peer review, field result, or domain-validation record.

## Environment and limits

Document versions, devices, datasets, parameters, assumptions, exclusions, and known failure modes.

## Independent status

Identify whether the evidence was produced by the repository author, an AI agent inside the same production loop, or an independent third party.

## Checklist

- [ ] The claim is narrow and testable.
- [ ] The evidence can be inspected or reproduced.
- [ ] Simulation evidence is not presented as real-world validation.
- [ ] First-person testimony is not presented as independent adjudication.
